rationale: This is a Dragon Ball Z anime power-fantasy hook — gold/orange/dark blue palette, male shonen protagonist, and explosive combat energy clash directly with Marble Sort's pastel lavender, character-free, calm/satisfying aesthetic. The "satisfaction" emotional label is the only thread of relevance, but it does not translate to color sorting or conveyor physics, and the implied audience (young male anime fans) inverts the casual women 25-55 target. Skip this archetype; if chasing "satisfaction" creatives, source ASMR-style sorting/pouring references instead, not IP-adjacent anime combat.
